name: Basic Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the potatoes in a pan with cold water and bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
3. Meanwhile, thinly slice the mushrooms, onions, and celery and combine them in a mixing bowl.
4. When the potatoes are tender, drain them and halve or quarter them, depending on size. Add them to the mixing bowl with the sliced vegetables.
5. Sprinkle with vinegar and cover. Refrigerate until cool.
6. Chop the hard-boiled eggs and add them to the bowl.
7. Add the Dijon mustard and mayonnaise, and season to taste with salt and pepper, mixing everything together gently.
